description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a single job named prepare in a custom Docker image registry.gitlab.com/bennyp/polymer-test:latest. Define a single stage called doitall. In the prepare job execute the following shell commands in order: yarn install, bower install --allow-root, xvfb-run polymer test, polymer build, cd functions, yarn install, cd .., and firebase deploy -m "Pipeline $CI_PIPELINE_ID, build $CI_BUILD_ID" -p "build/production" --non-interactive. The job has no caches, artifacts, or special rules, and it deploys the built Polymer app to Firebase.
